fields.name: cost_time_impact
fields.label: Cost / Time Impact
options: Affects cost or schedule (route to change event)

GET /benchmarks/costs?min_samples=3.message: Not enough history yet — need ≥3 posted direct costs per cost code across your projects to benchmark.

GET /energy/benchmark-status.message: No benchmarking provider configured. EUI and monthly trends are computed locally from meter readings; set ENERGY_STAR_PROVIDER + ENERGY_STAR_API_KEY to sync a property with EPA Portfolio Manager for the official 1-100 score.

tools.name: project_snapshot
tools.description: Cross-module status snapshot for a project: RFI/submittal/CO/punch/safety tallies, schedule + budget KPIs and the risk headline.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List records of a module (e.g. rfi, submittal, information_container) for a project.

tools.name: cde_status
tools.description: ISO 19650 CDE container discipline for a project.

tools.name: bim_kpi_scorecard
tools.description: The 10-category BIM KPI scorecard for a project.

tools.name: openbim_quality
tools.description: openBIM model quality (LOIN, IDS compliance, export health, bSDD) — needs a loaded model.

tools.name: standards_check
tools.description: Run a standards-compliance check (iso19650 | cobie | ids | uniclass) against the project's data; returns findings with clause references and recommendations.

tools.name: create_rfi
tools.description: Create an RFI (Request for Information) on a project.

GET /mcp/tools.note: Run the stdio MCP server and point Claude Desktop / Cursor at it to drive the project by natural language. The MCP SDK (pip install 'mcp[cli]') is optional.

risks.text: Forecast is over budget by $5,826,592 — review pending change orders and committed costs.
1 item(s) are overdue and need immediate attention.
1 change order(s) pending approval may impact cost/schedule.
2 open RFI(s) awaiting response could delay dependent work.
1 open safety item(s) — verify resolution before proceeding.
1 open punchlist item(s) remain for closeout.

constraints.basis: 16,000 SF footprint (lot coverage) x 20 floors (height 240ft / 12ft floors)

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.note: Site EUI (kBtu/sf/yr) annualized over the months with readings; standard conversion factors (kWh 3.412, therm 100). Water is tracked in gallons, not energy.

Recurring replacements from the asset register (install + expected life) plus open capital-plan items; costs escalated at the given inflation rate. Suggested level contribution is the flat annual amount that keeps the reserve balance non-negative.

Gross-up applies to occupancy-variable recoverable expenses only, up to the stated occupancy; fixed expenses (taxes, insurance) pass through at actual. Estimated payments = lease recovery_psf x rentable_sf.

ghg.note: Scope 1 = on-site fuel (natural gas); Scope 2 = purchased electricity/steam/cooling at the configured grid factor. Set AEC_GRID_KGCO2E_PER_KWH to your eGRID subregion.

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.message: No material quantities to assess — add production quantities with a material and unit.

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.note: CDE states per ISO 19650: WIP -> Shared -> Published -> Archived. Metadata completeness = containers with type, discipline, originator, suitability and revision all set.
A compliant appointment carries at least an EIR, a BEP, and (for the operational phase) an AIR. Missing core requirements are flagged.
Ten information-management KPI categories graded from CDE, model quality and the issue/asset/closeout records. Categories with no inputs show 'n/a' rather than a guess.
Data-drop acceptance mirrors an owner's handover checklist against the AIR: requirements, taggable asset data, as-builts, O&M and an accepted certificate.

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.label: ISO 19650 (information management)

findings.text: Core information requirements (EIR, BEP, AIR) are on file.
CDE metadata completeness 50.0% (type, discipline, originator, suitability, revision).

recommendations: CDE metadata completeness 50.0% (type, discipline, originator, suitability, revision).
GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.note: Checked against the CDE container discipline and the requirements register.

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.note: Checked against the loaded model's classification coverage.

dpp.note: Digital Product Passport is an emerging EU requirement (ESPR / revised CPR, phasing 2028-30): GS1 product ID + EPD/environmental + manufacturer traceability.

GET /projects/3e7343c6-f714-4de4-b2df-34.note: Twin readiness (ISO 23247): assets linked to a building system and mapped to a sensor/telemetry point, so live data can flow against a persistent asset identity.
Vendors needing a compliance nudge (expiring/expired/missing COI or unapproved prequal). Send before it blocks a bid invitation or pay application.

The program as a graph: nodes are spaces (area x quantity), edges are adjacency preferences. Net = leasable/occupiable use; the gross area and use mix feed the zoning->massing generator and the proforma.

Business case

data.subject: 1 Preparation & Briefing — Pre-Design / Programming
data.deliverables:
Project brief / program
EIR (Exchange Information Requirements)
BEP
Feasibility studies

data.subject: 2 Concept Design — Schematic Design (SD)
data.deliverables:
Massing + concept model
Design narrative
Outline specs
SD estimate (Class 4)

data.subject: 3 Spatial Coordination — Design Development (DD)
data.deliverables:
Coordinated architecture + structure + MEP
Developed specs
DD estimate (Class 3)
Clash-free model

data.subject: 4 Technical Design — Construction Documents (CD)
data.deliverables:
Construction drawings
Project manual / specifications
IDS-validated model
CD estimate (Class 2)

data.subject: 5 Manufacturing & Construction — Bidding + Construction Administration (CA)
data.deliverables:
Bid / award
RFIs + submittals
ASIs / bulletins / change orders
Site observation reports

data.subject: 6 Handover — Substantial Completion / Closeout
data.deliverables:
Punch list + architect sign-off
G704 substantial completion
As-built / record model
COBie + O&M turnover

data.subject: 7 Use — Post-Occupancy / Operations
data.deliverables:
Warranty tracking
Commissioning close-out
Post-occupancy evaluation
Operations & maintenance
